![][image1]

**Product Features**  
**“ONE Wedge Technology” – For short game success in the fairway, rough, and sand**

Primary Features

* **Auto Glide Sole** – Big sole and bounce *plus* 4-way curves toward each end for better contact through basically any lie you encounter ←The hero feature  
  * Line of sand wedges given sole and offerings in 50, 56, and 60 ←Very unique angle  
* **Pitch Control** – Unique weighting across the face for more forgiveness and ball-speed consistency whether hit well or mishit

Secondary Features

* **Square and Shoot** – Very straight leading edge (1) and center face alignment marking (2) for easier alignment and a more consistent contact location  
* **Spin-Friction Face** – Helps to produce spin even on shorter shots for more control  
* **Motion Swing Weighted** – Weighting helps your hands continue to move with the clubhead (anti-flipping) for the reduction of the worst misses (chunks/thin shots)

Other Details

* Offered left and right handed  
* Offered 50, 56, and 60 degrees  
* Shaft: not too stiff or too flexible  
* Grip: velvet pattern (pretty standard)
